---
title: 'Empowered 2 Prosper: Paradox of Excellence'
date: '2012-01-25T18:57:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7875690576288857218'

---

<a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/2011/12/paradox-of-excellence.html?spref=bl">Empowered 2 Prosper: Paradox of Excellence</a>: Paradox of Excellence:   Philippians 3:7-9 NKJV  7  But what things were gain to me, these I have counted loss for Christ . 8 Yet indeed I a...
